title: Just Your Simple Vanilla Optimizer!
description: So basically. This modpack adds 70+ mods to completely optimize Minecraft visually and performance wise. These mods include Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and a lot more!
body:
Hello!

This is a very in-testing modpack that optimizes vanilla to it's full potential.

It adds 70+ mods and has more incoming as mods get uploaded to Modrinth!
This modpack aims to provide a vanilla+ expirience to players with texture updates, sound updates, and performance upgrades!

So get your Potato PCs running and play this modpack now!
